data.title: ESSENCE honors Chase Infiniti, Kerry Washington, and others at the 19th Annual Black Women in Hollywood event, highlighting key women in entertainment.
data.description: In Los Angeles, ESSENCE has revealed the lineup for the 2026 Black Women in Hollywood ceremony. Chase Infiniti and prominent figures such as Kerry Washington and LaTanya Richardson Jackson will be honored during the event. The ceremony will also feature a Luminary Spotlight recognizing the women of 'SINNERS’ including Autumn Durald Arkapaw, Hannah Beachler, Jayme Lawson, Ruth E. Carter, Shunika Terry-Jennings, and Wunmi Mosaku. The event will take place on Thursday, March 12th at the Fairmont Century Pl, marking the beginning of entertainment’s major awards-season weekend.

data.title: ADA price may hit $0.32-$0.37 by March 2026. Currently at $0.27 with RSI 35.52 & bearish MACD momentum. Support at $0.28.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Cardano is currently being traded at a value of $0.27, accompanied by a neutral Relative Strength Index (RSI) of 35.52 and a bearish Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) momentum. Based on technical analysis, it is projected that by March 2026, the value of Cardano (ADA) could potentially reach a range between $0.32 and $0.37, with a significant resistance level expected at $0.28.

data.title: CEO of Strategy (NASDAQ: MSTR) expects Bitcoin sell-off to be unlikely and aims to double BTC per share in 7 years. Stock acts as leveraged proxy for asset, targeting yield-focused investors. The company's Digital Asset Treasury offers amplified exposure to Bitcoin. Lee describes Bitcoin as "digital capital" tied to volatility. Strategy's stock tends to move more sharply than Bitcoin. Company aims to cater to investors seeking yield with reduced volatility.
data.description: Fong Lee, the CEO of Strategy (NASDAQ: MSTR), outlined how the company's Digital Asset Treasury (DAT) model is designed to provide increased exposure to Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC), positioning the stock as a leveraged representation of the asset. Referred to as Strategy's ‘Stretch' Product, the focus is on attracting investors looking for higher yields. In an interview with Bloomberg, Lee characterized Bitcoin as "digital capital," highlighting its decentralized nature and limited supply, leading to inherent volatility. Consequently, Strategy's stock tends to experience more pronounced movements compared to Bitcoin, in both positive and negative directions. The company aims to serve investors seeking yield while mitigating volatility through its offerings.

data.title: Stardock reveals Clairvoyance, AI app turning agents into self-learning staff. Free alpha version Download now!
data.description: In an announcement made on February 11, 2026, in Plymouth, Michigan, Stardock unveiled their latest creation, Clairvoyance. This free application marks a significant shift in how users interact with AI. Bringing a novel approach to AI workspaces, Clairvoyance introduces agents acting as "staff" to enhance user experience. Stardock, known for developing Object Desktop, Fences, and Start11, is offering this alpha version of Clairvoyance for users to explore the new possibilities it presents in AI technology.

data.title: 40% of companies spend over $10M yearly on AI, affecting cloud efficiency by 15%. FinOps maturity rising.
data.description: A recent report by CloudZero, a prominent provider of cloud efficiency solutions, revealed that the rapid advancement of artificial intelligence (AI) technology has had a notable impact on cloud efficiency rates. Specifically, the AI surge has resulted in a 15% decrease in cloud efficiency. However, amidst this trend, there has been a significant acceleration in the maturity of financial operations (FinOps). The report titled "FinOps In The AI Era: A Critical Recalibration" highlights these findings and sheds light on the evolving landscape of cloud and AI technologies. The data was released on February 12, 2026, from Boston.

data.title: Vandis, Inc made CRN's MSP 500 list in Security 100 category for 2026. Important numbers: Feb 12, 2026.
data.description: In Albertson, New York on February 12, 2026, Vandis, Inc shared that CRN® recognized them by including them in the Security 100 category of the 2026 Managed Service Provider (MSP) 500 list. This list, curated by CRN®, a division of The Channel Company, showcases top MSPs in the industry. This acknowledgement highlights Vandis' excellence in the security sector among their peers. The MSP 500 list serves as a valuable resource identifying prominent players in the managed services space.

data.title: Real estate expert Sander Scott in Northport discusses off-water lifestyle in Leelanau County in a new article.
data.description: In Northport, Michigan on February 12, 2026, a recent article by HelloNation explores the top activities residents can enjoy in Leelanau County beyond water-related attractions. The article delves into the outdoor and cultural experiences available in the region, shedding light on how they contribute to the daily life of residents.

data.title: Solana (SOL) aims for a rebound to $95-105 by March 2026, currently trading at $81.43 with RSI at 28.60. Technical analysis hints at a possible recovery.
data.description: The current trading price of SOL is $81.43, while the Relative Strength Index (RSI) is at a low of 28.60, indicating oversold conditions. Analysts predict a potential recovery target of $95-105 by March 2026 based on technical indicators, which suggest a possible bounce back from the current support levels.

data.title: THE WHOO appoints Nicky Hilton Rothschild as Global Brand Ambassador to introduce Korean luxury skincare in US.
data.description: In Los Angeles on February 12, 2026, THE WHOO, a renowned heritage skincare brand from South Korea, disclosed the selection of Nicky Hilton Rothschild as its Brand Ambassador. This move signifies a notable step in the brand's growth in the American luxury beauty market.

data.title: Western Copper and Gold increases financing to C$80 million due to high demand, working with Stifel Canada.
data.description: In Vancouver, BC on February 12, 2026, Western Copper and Gold Corporation (TSX: WRN) (NYSE American: WRN) revealed that they have modified their agreement with Stifel Canada in response to a high level of investor interest. This amended deal was made by the Company with Stifel Canada, acting for both parties, due to growing demand.

data.title: MediStreams' Customer Advisory Board meeting highlights client-led innovation and healthcare payment automation progress; second annual meeting in Atlanta.
data.description: In Atlanta, MediStreams recently held its second annual Customer Advisory Board meeting to highlight advancements in healthcare payment automation. The event focused on innovation and collaboration in Revenue Cycle Management (RCM). The gathering aimed to enhance customer relations and showcase progress in the industry.
